Enum Class MiiConsentPolicyValueSet

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<MiiConsentPolicyValueSet>
de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.enums.MiiConsentPolicyValueSet
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<MiiConsentPolicyValueSet>, Constable
public enum MiiConsentPolicyValueSet extends Enum<MiiConsentPolicyValueSet>
Names and Codes from the kds module consent in the simplifier Used in plugin.orbis and plugin.biobank.

    • valueOf

      public static MiiConsentPolicyValueSet valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
